name: Nabil Hasan
bio: Former coworker who now trains with me in the evenings. Great person for accountability and career advice.

name: Aisha Rahman
bio: Met during software engineering classes. We still share coding resources and catch up over coffee whenever possible.

name: Sarah Ahmed
bio: We prepared for board exams together. She now works in design and always gives thoughtful creative feedback.

name: Tanvir Chowdhury
bio: Neighborhood friend since childhood. We mostly reconnect around football matches and family events.

name: Maya Sultana
bio: Monthly book club friend who loves historical fiction and always recommends excellent reads.

name: Rafiul Karim
bio: Connected through freelancing communities. We often exchange ideas about clients, pricing, and web development tools.

name: Farzana Noor
bio: Family friend who moved abroad. We love sharing travel stories and photos from different cities.

name: Imran Hossain
bio: Met through online gaming, then became a real-life weekend hangout friend. We usually play co-op games and discuss gadgets.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: We met at a startup networking event. She gives practical advice on product ideas, growth, and career direction.

name: Siam Mahmud
bio: A travel and street photography friend who often plans short photo walks and weekend trips around Bangladesh.
